title: Activity Registry
description: Canonical declaration of all activities — their concepts, sub-modes, mechanics, lesson chain settings, and reward emissions. Captures the structural bits from /specs/activities/<grade>/<slug>.md; free-text design content stays in the markdown specs.

id.description: Activity slug. Kebab-case. Unique across all activities. Matches the spec file name.

region.description: The region this activity lives in. Grade regions are sanctuary/wundletown/mathopolis. The Foundry is a making location. Portals are themed worlds.

grade.description: Grade level. 'any' for universal portals that auto-target the kid's current grade.

specRef.description: Relative path to the activity's markdown spec (e.g., 'specs/activities/kindergarten/counting-parade.md').

concepts.description: Concepts this activity touches, with role.

intraRoundLessonChain.description: Present iff this activity opts into the intra-round lesson chain override per micro-lessons.md.

subModes.description: Sub-modes the activity supports. Each sub-mode is an alternative round shape (varies across rounds, not within).

phases.description: Phases present in every round of this activity. Present iff the activity uses the two-phase round structure per k-activity-patterns.md.

stylusMechanics.description: Stylus mechanics this activity uses, referencing names in stylus-mechanics.md.

numberWritingModes.description: Number-writing modes used (per number-writing-modes.md). Omit if the activity doesn't ask for numerals.

mathNotebookRelationship.description: How this activity uses the math notebook per math-notebook.md.

challengeVariant.description: Activity's challenge variant per Challenge Modes in the plan. Omit if the activity has no challenge variant.

contentTemplates.description: Present iff this activity uses content-templated rounds (story templates, problem templates).

visibleNarratorCharacter.description: Character name if the narrator is embodied as a visible scene character (e.g., 'storyteller-turtle'). Omit if narrator is unseen (default).

role.description: Per the activity-spec template. 'introduces' = canonical introducer. 'exercises' = uses the concept, introduced elsewhere. 'exercises-no-introducer' = concept has no introducer anywhere (coverage-based mastery).

isInLessonChain.description: True if this concept's lesson is part of the activity's intra-round lesson chain.

lessonChainPosition.description: Order in the lesson chain (1, 2, ...). Present iff isInLessonChain is true.

concepts.description: Ordered list of conceptIds in chain order.

rationale.description: Why this activity uses an intra-round chain (the structural reason — e.g., 'Phase 1 and Phase 2 are inseparable').

isDemotionFloor.description: True if this sub-mode is the simplest, target of staggered demotion when sub-mode demote fires.

primaryConcepts.description: Concept IDs this sub-mode primarily targets.

subModeId.description: References a sub-mode id within this activity (must have isChallenge=true).

entryFrequency.description: How often the kid can enter the challenge.

canonicalEvents.description: Canonical reward events this activity emits, referencing reward-economy.md event names.

activityDefinedEvents.description: Activity-defined custom reward events, per the extension point in reward-economy.md.

permanentFixtureType.description: If this activity produces permanent fixtures, the fixture type (e.g., 'habitat').

eventName.description: Event name. Must be prefixed with activity slug (e.g., 'habitat.permanent_fixture_built').

unlocksTrophy.description: Hub trophy unlocked by completing the set.

storyTemplateCount.description: Number of story templates at launch (planned).

problemTemplateCount.description: Number of problem templates at launch (planned).

templatePaths.description: Directory paths in data/templates/ where this activity's templates live.
